AUTOSAR AP Release 18-10
Table of Contents
1 Introduction and functional overview 4
1.1 Intended audience : 5
1.2 Relation to other standards : 6
2 Acronyms and Abbreviations 7
3 Automated Driving Sensor Use Cases 8

3.3 Use Case 3: “Sensor Fusion Algorithm” : 9
3.4 Use Case 4: “Sensor Fusion Integration” : 10
3.5 Use Case 5: “Sensor Implementation Testing” : 10
3.6 Use Case 6: “Sensor Simulation” : 10
4 Scope of Sensor Interface Standardization 11

5.1 Sensor Interface realization as Service : 13
5.2 ISO mapping to Sensor Services : 14
5.3 Sensor Service Template : 15
5.4 Interface stability : 16
5.5 Interface configuration : 16

— AUTOSAR CONFIDENTIAL —Document ID 913: AUTOSAR_EXP_SensorInterfaces
